author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text: I am surprised how often I have applied knowledge from university CS classes while designing Caddy 2. In particular: set theory, complexity theory, automata theory, and programming languages / compilers.
